testcase.name: test_05_update_lead_partner

skipped.message: ICICI partner not found or no test lead

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_p0_partner_flow.py:129: ICICI partner not found or no test lead

testcase.name: test_11_get_report_styles

failure.message: AssertionError: Styles should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'detailed': {'description': 'Technical report with all inspection data and metrics', 'features': ['Technical specifications', 'Component-wise breakdown', 'Scoring metrics', 'Historical comparison'], 'name': 'Detailed Technical Report', 'preview_color': '#059669'}, 'premium': {'description': 'Detailed layout with photos and comprehensive analysis', 'features': ['Full vehicle details', 'Photo gallery', 'Detailed analysis', 'Recommendations'], 'name': 'Premium Report', 'preview_color': '#8B5CF6'}, 'standard': {'description': 'Clean, simple layout with essential information', 'features': ['Basic vehicle info', 'Pass/Fail summary', 'Key findings'], 'name': 'Standard Report', 'preview_color': '#3B82F6'}}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_partner_flow.py:268: in test_11_get_report_styles assert isinstance(styles, list), "Styles should be a list" E AssertionError: Styles should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'detailed': {'description': 'Technical report with all inspection data and metrics', 'features': ['Technical specifications', 'Component-wise breakdown', 'Scoring metrics', 'Historical comparison'], 'name': 'Detailed Technical Report', 'preview_color': '#059669'}, 'premium': {'description': 'Detailed layout with photos and comprehensive analysis', 'features': ['Full vehicle details', 'Photo gallery', 'Detailed analysis', 'Recommendations'], 'name': 'Premium Report', 'preview_color': '#8B5CF6'}, 'standard': {'description': 'Clean, simple layout with essential information', 'features': ['Basic vehicle info', 'Pass/Fail summary', 'Key findings'], 'name': 'Standard Report', 'preview_color': '#3B82F6'}}, list)
